reviews.comment:
Actualmente cerrado por reformas. Soy cliente del full. Buen lugar, muy buena atención, poca variedad de productos.

(Translated by Google)
Currently closed for renovations. I'm a regular customer. Good place, very good service, limited product selection.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNnFDd0JnEAE

reviews.comment:
Nunca tiene nafta, siempre están los conos naranjas. Ya cierren definitivamente, no sé para qué está esta estación la verdad.

(Translated by Google)
It never has gas, there are always orange cones. They should just close it down for good, I honestly don't know what this station is even for.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1NmM2aUhnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente la atención y el servicio. Lleve mi auto al Service. Completo, tiempo acorde y sobresaliente predisposición.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and attention. I took my car to the service center. Complete, timely, and outstandingly helpful.
